compiled_state.title: onboarding SKILL.md: sed -i.bak preplanning.interactive snippet does not clean up .bak backup file

compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The bash pseudocode snippet for overwriting preplanning.interactive in dso-config.conf uses sed -i.bak but does not include cleanup of the .bak backup file. This could leave a stale backup artifact in .claude/ directory.
File: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
Category: correctness (minor)

comments.body: Investigation: Searched plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md for sed -i.bak pattern (the preplanning.interactive snippet). No such snippet found in current code — the file uses no sed -i.bak commands. Bug appears to be already resolved (likely fixed in a prior session). Closing as pre-existing fix.
comments.author: Test
